about.heading: About Ongles Maily
body: Ongles Maily is a professional nail salon located at Carrefour Beauport in Québec City. We believe that beautiful nails begin with exceptional hygiene and genuine care — which is why every visit starts and ends with your safety and comfort in mind.

Our team brings more than 15 years of experience in nail artistry. That expertise shows in every detail — clean lines, long-lasting sets and flawless finishes, whether you come in for a natural manicure or a full set with custom nail art.

We operate three dedicated disinfection stations, sanitize every tool after each use, maintain sanitized pedicure stations, and use dust collectors at all manicure stations. This isn't a checklist — it's simply how we work.
From maintenance fills to manicures and pedicures, we offer a full range of services designed to fit your schedule. Our starting prices are posted clearly, with no surprises.
We know life doesn't always go to plan. That's why walk-ins are always welcome alongside booked appointments — and no deposit is required, with or without an appointment.
At Ongles Maily, you are our family. We look forward to taking care of you — come see us at Carrefour Beauport, through Entrances 4 or 5.

pose-ongles.title: Nail Enhancements at Ongles Maily, Québec
pose-ongles.heroAlt: Beautiful nail enhancements — full set at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport
intro: Our nail enhancement service delivers a full set of beautiful, durable nails — with or without extensions. Whether you prefer a natural, clean look or want to add length and nail art, our experienced team shapes, builds and finishes your nails exactly the way you want.

We never rush the process. Every set is done with care and precision using professional-grade products, following our strict hygiene protocol — three disinfection stations, tools sanitized after every use, and dust collectors at every manicure station.
pose-ongles.whyUs: Clients at Carrefour Beauport trust Ongles Maily for consistent, high-quality results. Our team's 15+ years of experience means you'll leave with nails that look exactly how you imagined — and a salon experience that puts your safety first.
included: Full set nail enhancements with or without extensions
Your choice of shape and length
Nail shaping and meticulous cuticle care
Access to a wide range of colours and finishes
addons: Nail art on 2–4 fingers (+$5–10) or all 10 (+$15–25)
pose-ongles.duration: About 60–90 minutes depending on shape, length and add-ons.
pose-ongles.aftercare: Apply cuticle oil daily and wear gloves for cleaning or dishwashing — water and harsh detergents are the main cause of early lifting. When it's time for a change, book a proper fill or removal rather than picking, which can damage your natural nail.
pose-ongles.hygiene: Your safety is our priority. We operate three dedicated disinfection stations, sanitize every tool after each use, and use dust collectors at every manicure station — the hygiene standard behind every Ongles Maily service.

faq.q: How long do nail enhancements last?
faq.a: Nail enhancements typically last 2–3 weeks before needing a fill. With proper aftercare — cuticle oil daily, gloves for cleaning — you can extend their life and keep them looking fresh.

faq.q: Can I add nail art to my full set?
faq.a: Yes. Nail art is available on 2–4 fingers or all 10, with options for multiple colours, diamonds and ornaments. We'll walk you through the options at your appointment.
Yes. Prosthetic removal is available as an add-on for $20. We always recommend professional removal to protect the health of your natural nails.

pose-ongles.metaTitle: Nail Enhancements at Ongles Maily | Carrefour Beauport, Québec
pose-ongles.metaDescription: Full set nail enhancements with or without extensions at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport. Nail art, multiple colours, hygiene-first. From $60.

remplissage.title: Nail Fill at Ongles Maily, Québec
remplissage.heroAlt: Professional nail fill in progress at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport
intro: A professional fill every 2–3 weeks keeps your nail enhancements looking fresh, strong and flawless. As your natural nails grow, the gap at the base fills in — a timely refill prevents lifting, maintains the structure and keeps your nails looking their best.
Our team takes the same careful, unhurried approach to fills as to a full set — properly cleaning, shaping, and finishing every nail with professional-grade products.
remplissage.whyUs: Regular fills at Ongles Maily maintain the quality and longevity of your enhancements. Our 15+ years of experience means we'll assess your nails at each visit and recommend the right approach to keep them strong and beautiful.
included: Refill of the growth gap at the base of each nail
Your choice of colour or design update
Hygiene-first environment — tools sanitized after every use
addons: Nail art on 2–4 fingers (+$5–10) or all 10 (+$15–25)
remplissage.duration: About 45–75 minutes depending on the condition of the nails and add-ons.
remplissage.aftercare: Apply cuticle oil daily to keep your natural nail and enhancement flexible. Avoid prying things open with your nails and wear gloves for wet work. Book your next fill in 2–3 weeks before the gap becomes too large.
remplissage.hygiene: Every tool is disinfected after each use at our three dedicated disinfection stations. Your safety comes first at every Ongles Maily appointment.

faq.q: How often should I get a fill?
faq.a: Every 2–3 weeks is typical. Waiting too long allows the gap to grow and increases the risk of lifting or breakage.

faq.q: Can I change my colour or design at a fill appointment?
faq.a: Yes. A fill is a great opportunity to update your colour or add new nail art. Just let us know what you have in mind.

faq.q: What if one of my nails breaks before my fill?
faq.a: Call or walk in — we can repair a broken nail. It's always better to fix it promptly to protect the underlying natural nail.

remplissage.metaTitle: Nail Fill at Ongles Maily | Carrefour Beauport, Québec
remplissage.metaDescription: Professional nail fill every 2–3 weeks at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport. Keep your enhancements fresh and strong. From $45.

soins-mains.title: Manicure at Ongles Maily, Québec
soins-mains.heroAlt: Professional manicure with polish at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport
intro: A classic manicure at Ongles Maily is thorough, precise and relaxing. We shape your nails, care for your cuticles and finish with your choice of polish — leaving your hands looking clean, polished and well-groomed.
Whether you want a simple polish change or a complete hand care treatment, our experienced team takes the time to do it properly. No rushing, no cutting corners.
soins-mains.whyUs: With 15+ years of experience and an unwavering commitment to hygiene, Ongles Maily delivers manicure results you can count on. Our sanitized tools and careful technique mean every visit is as safe as it is beautiful.
included: Nail shaping to your preferred style
addons: Polish change only (without full cuticle treatment)
Gel polish for a longer-lasting finish
soins-mains.duration: About 30–45 minutes for a full manicure; about 20 minutes for a polish change.
soins-mains.aftercare: Let your polish dry fully before exposing your nails to water. Apply cuticle oil regularly to keep nails flexible and healthy. Wear gloves for cleaning and dishwashing to extend the life of your polish.
soins-mains.hygiene: All tools are disinfected after every client at our three dedicated disinfection stations. Dust collectors at every manicure station keep the air clean for you and our team.

faq.q: What is included in a manicure?
faq.a: Our full manicure includes nail shaping, cuticle care and polish application with your chosen colour — starting at $40. A polish change only (without cuticle treatment) is available from $30.

faq.q: How long does a manicure take?
faq.a: A full manicure takes about 30–45 minutes. A polish change is quicker, around 20 minutes.

faq.q: Can I get gel polish on a manicure?
faq.a: Yes. Gel polish is available as an add-on for a chip-resistant finish that lasts 2–3 weeks. Ask our team at your appointment.

soins-mains.metaTitle: Manicure at Ongles Maily | Carrefour Beauport, Québec
soins-mains.metaDescription: Professional manicure with polish, cuticle care and nail shaping at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport, Québec. From $30.

soins-pieds.title: Pedicure at Ongles Maily, Québec
soins-pieds.heroAlt: Professional pedicure in a sanitized station at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport
intro: Our pedicure service is a genuine treat for your feet — and a thorough one. We shape your toenails, care for your cuticles, and finish with your choice of polish. Every pedicure is performed in our sanitized pedicure stations for your complete peace of mind.
Whether you want a full foot care treatment or a simple polish change, our experienced team works carefully and efficiently so you leave feeling fresh and well-cared-for.
soins-pieds.whyUs: Sanitized pedicure stations are a non-negotiable at Ongles Maily. Combined with 15+ years of experience and tools disinfected after every use, you can relax knowing your treatment is as hygienic as it is enjoyable.
included: Toenail shaping and thorough cuticle care
Sanitized pedicure station for every client
addons: Polish change feet only (without full treatment)
Gel polish for a longer-lasting finish
soins-pieds.duration: About 45–60 minutes for a full pedicure; about 20–30 minutes for a polish change or trim.
soins-pieds.aftercare: Moisturise your feet daily, especially the heels. If you chose gel polish, it's ready immediately; regular polish needs a little drying time — wear open shoes home. Keep toenails trimmed regularly to avoid ingrown nails.
soins-pieds.hygiene: We sanitize every pedicure station between clients. Tools are disinfected at our three dedicated disinfection stations after every use. Your hygiene and safety are our first priority.

faq.q: What is included in a pedicure?
faq.a: Our full pedicure includes toenail shaping, cuticle care and polish application — from $60. A polish change for feet only is available from $35, and a toenail trim is from $20.
Yes, always. We sanitize every pedicure station between clients as part of our hygiene-first approach.

faq.q: How often should I get a pedicure?
faq.a: Every 4–6 weeks is typical for healthy, well-groomed feet. Many clients come more often in summer or before special occasions.

soins-pieds.metaTitle: Pedicure at Ongles Maily | Carrefour Beauport, Québec
soins-pieds.metaDescription: Professional pedicure in sanitized stations at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport, Québec. Toenail care, cuticle treatment and polish. From $35.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know before your visit to Ongles Maily at Carrefour Beauport.

items.a: We are at Carrefour Beauport — 3333 Rue du Carrefour, Entrées 4 ou 5, Québec, QC G1C 5R9. Parking is available at the mall.

items.q: Do you take walk-ins or is it appointment only?
items.a: Both. We welcome walk-ins when we have availability, and we encourage booking ahead to guarantee your time — especially evenings and weekends.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Book online any time through our Book Online page, or call us at (418) 660-8228. Walk-ins are always welcome too.
Nail enhancements (full set), fills, manicures and pedicures. See our Services page for details and pricing.

items.q: How do you keep tools and stations clean?
items.a: Hygiene is our top priority. We have three dedicated disinfection stations, tools are disinfected after every use, pedicure stations are sanitized between clients, and dust collectors are installed at every manicure station.
Yes — gift cards are available online via Square for any amount (delivered by email), or you can purchase one in person at the salon.

terms.heading: Terms & Conditions
intro: At Ongles Maily, our goal is to give every client a professional, safe and high-quality experience. So that everything goes smoothly — and everyone is treated fairly — we invite you to read the policies below before your appointment. By booking with us, you accept these terms.
These policies apply to all services offered at Ongles Maily, Carrefour Beauport, Québec.

blocks.text: Booking an appointment is recommended to reserve the time and technician of your choice. Walk-in clients are welcome, subject to availability.
Please arrive 5 to 10 minutes before your appointment time for check-in.
Out of respect for our team and other clients, we ask for at least 24 hours' notice for any cancellation or change to an appointment.
Late cancellations or no-shows may incur a fee, and certain bookings may require a deposit at the time of booking. Any such fees are communicated to you when you book.

Prices are shown in Canadian dollars and are subject to applicable taxes. The final price may vary depending on length, design complexity and add-ons; any surcharge is communicated before the service begins.
We accept cash, debit and major credit cards. Tips are appreciated but never required.

items: Gift cards can be purchased online via Square for any amount and delivered by email, or purchased in person at the salon.
Gift cards are non-refundable and should be treated like cash.
We cannot replace a lost or stolen gift card.

blocks.text: Your satisfaction matters to us. Please check the result before leaving so any concern can be addressed right away. If you notice a technical issue with your service after you leave, contact us within 7 days so we can assess the situation and, where appropriate, provide a complimentary fix for the same shape, length and design.
Changes of preference, normal wear and damage from daily life or at-home care are not covered.

items: Three dedicated disinfection stations are in operation at all times.
All tools are disinfected after every client.
Pedicure stations are sanitized between every appointment.
Dust collectors are installed at every manicure station.

blocks.text: Please reschedule if you are unwell, and let us know of any medical condition, allergy or sensitivity so we can adapt the service safely.
By booking and receiving services at Ongles Maily, you acknowledge that you have read and accepted these policies. We thank you for choosing us and look forward to taking care of you.

terms.updated: Last updated: May 22, 2026 — Ongles Maily · Carrefour Beauport, Québec, Canada

privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
intro: This Privacy Policy explains how Ongles Maily collects, uses and protects your personal information when you visit our website, book an appointment or receive our services.
By using our website or our services, you accept the practices described in this policy.

items: Contact details you provide when booking or sending a message (name, phone, email).
Appointment details: services booked, date, time and service history.
Newsletter subscriptions: your email address, if you choose to join.
Limited technical data (device type, pages viewed) to operate and improve the site.
Schedule, confirm and manage your appointments;
Respond to requests sent through our contact form;
Send offers and updates if you subscribe to our newsletter;
Meet our legal and accounting obligations under applicable Québec and Canadian law.

blocks.text: We do not sell your personal information and do not share it for marketing purposes without your consent. We share information with service providers (for example, our online booking and payment platform) only as needed to deliver their services.
You can unsubscribe from our newsletter at any time, and you may request access to or correction of your information by contacting us at onglesmailyqc@gmail.com.
We use reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect your information against unauthorized access, use or disclosure.

privacy.updated: Last updated: May 22, 2026 — Ongles Maily · Carrefour Beauport, Québec, Canada
